overview: monedaDigital is a platform for restaurants to offer digital menus via QR code. Customers scan the QR at their table and instantly view the menu on their phones with no app download required. It features a manager portal for restaurant setup, menu management, and QR code generation, with full Spanish/English support.
features: Internet Identity authentication with role-based access (SUPER_ADMIN, MANAGER, WAITER, KITCHEN)
Manager portal with 4 modules: My Restaurant, Menu/QR, Staff, Dashboard
Restaurant profile setup with logo and background image uploads via object-storage
Digital menu PDF upload and management via object-storage
Client-side QR code generation encoding the public restaurant URL, downloadable as image
Public QR landing page for customers (no login required)
